mapper.select: SELECT ATT_SEQ AS fileSeq , FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath , FILE_TYPE AS fileNm , FILE_CAPA AS fileSize FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL WHERE ATT_SEQ = #{attSeq}
SELECT ATT_SEQ, BOARD_SEQ FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CRET_DT DESC) AS RNK, ATT_SEQ, BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL WHERE BOARD_SEQ=#{boardSeq} ) WHERE RNK= 1
